title: phaseolus pedicellatus var. grayanus
intro: Phaseolus pedicellatus var. grayanus, also known as the Gray's bean or Adzuki bean, is a type of legume native to East Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phaseolus pedicellatus var. grayanus include reducing blood sugar levels, lowering cholesterol, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve drying and processing the seeds or leaves into teas, capsules, or powder, which can be consumed to reap its health benefits.
